title: Head of AI Engineering
description:
We are partnered with a global technology group seeking an Head of AI Engineering to build and lead a new engineering function responsible for delivering production-grade AI services across the organisation.

This role sits at the heart of the central AI unit and is focused on designing and operating scalable AI service components that support a wide set of products and teams. It is a hands-on leadership role with significant influence over engineering culture, delivery standards, and cross-functional collaboration.

Key Responsibilities

• Build, lead, and mentor a high-performing engineering team delivering full-stack AI services
• Own end-to-end architecture and platform governance for cross-team AI service components
• Prioritise and manage delivery across multiple AI use cases with product and engineering leadership
• Deliver core platform capabilities (e.g., AI runtimes, fine-tuning pipelines, evaluation frameworks, SDKs/APIs)
• Establish engineering best practices: testing, documentation, observability, CI/CD, versioning, release management
• Ensure privacy, security, compliance, and model transparency across all services
• Communicate trade-offs, investments, and platform impact to senior stakeholders

Qualifications

• Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science/Software Engineering or equivalent experience
• Proven track record delivering AI/ML services or platforms in production
• Strong background in cloud-native engineering (any cloud: AWS, Azure, GCP)
• Deep expertise in backend architecture, API design, data integration, and platform engineering
• Strong grounding in security, compliance, observability, and SLO-driven operations
• Excellent stakeholder management and communication
• Fluent English; German is a plus

title: Vice President – AI Platform Owner
description:
📍 RAKBANK | Enterprise AI | GenAI | Platforms at Scale

🤖 About the Role:

As Vice President - AI Platform Owner, you will own and lead RAKBANK’s enterprise AI platform that powers GenAI and advanced AI capabilities across the bank. This is a role with real ownership - responsible for production platforms operating at scale, serving real customers, and meeting enterprise‑grade risk and regulatory requirements. You will lead the technology foundation for AI enablement, acting as the single point of accountability across cloud and on‑prem environments, while ensuring AI capabilities are secure, scalable, cost‑effective, and reusable. Balancing rapid innovation with stability and governance, you will establish the AI platform as a core, executive‑sponsored enterprise capability and partner closely with senior business and technology leaders to embed AI as a strategic, bank‑wide driver of impact.

🧠 What You’ll Be Doing:

You’ll sit at the intersection of AI strategy, platform engineering, and enterprise execution.

• Own the end‑to‑end AI platform strategy, roadmap, architecture, and operating model
• Define and evolve the AI platform vision aligned with enterprise technology and business strategy
• Make critical build vs buy vs partner decisions for AI models, platforms, and tooling
• Enable modern AI paradigms including GenAI, agentic AI, AI‑augmented development, and AIOps
• Own the full lifecycle of LLMs and SLMs across open‑source and commercial ecosystems
• Lead model selection, evaluation, onboarding, fine‑tuning, and retirement decisions
• Oversee prompt strategies, embeddings, vector databases, and inference optimisation
• Enable a multi‑model, multi‑provider strategy across cloud, on‑prem, and hybrid environments
• Lead deployment and operations of the AI platform across public cloud and private/on‑prem infrastructure
• Ensure high availability, resilience, scalability, secure data handling, and data isolation
• Ensure compliance with data residency, privacy, and regulatory requirements
• Integrate AI platforms with core banking systems, APIs, event platforms, data platforms, and digital channels
• Partner with business, operations, risk, compliance, and technology teams to identify and prioritise high‑impact AI use cases
• Enable rapid experimentation without compromising enterprise controls
• Provide reusable AI services, APIs, and platform components
• Support AI adoption across customer experience, operations, automation, risk, compliance, fraud, and engineering productivity
• Own run operations including monitoring, incidents, performance, SLAs, and model quality
• Manage platform change including enhancements, new model onboarding, and capability upgrades
• Establish clear ownership, escalation, and support models
• Own AI platform cost management across model usage, compute, storage, networking, tooling, and licensing
• Embed Responsible AI principles into the platform by design
• Implement explainability, auditability, logging, and traceability controls
• Manage relationships with cloud providers, AI vendors, open‑source communities, and system integrators
• Stay ahead of emerging AI technologies and assess their impact on the bank
• Lead, mentor, and grow a high‑performing AI platform engineering organisation
• Act as a senior AI technology evangelist across RAKBANK

🎯 What We’re Looking For:

We’re looking for a builder and owner, not a theorist.

• Proven experience owning enterprise‑scale platforms with true end‑to‑end accountability
• Demonstrated success operating at senior leadership or VP level in complex organizations
• Strong run + change mindset with enterprise‑grade execution discipline
• Ability to operate in fast‑moving, ambiguous, and highly regulated environments
• Experience managing cost, performance, and reliability at scale
• Strong executive‑level stakeholder management and decision‑making capability
• Ability to translate business strategy into scalable AI platform capabilities

🛠 Skills:

• 10+ years’ experience in platform, cloud, or enterprise engineering roles with senior leadership exposure
• Hands‑on experience with LLM‑based platforms and AI tooling
• Experience deploying and operating AI platforms in cloud and/or on‑prem environments
• Strong knowledge of APIs, microservices, data platforms, and event‑driven architectures
• Deep understanding of LLM architectures, prompt engineering, embeddings, and vector databases
• Experience with AI model lifecycle management, MLOps and LLMOps
• Experience in banking or highly regulated industries (preferred)
• Exposure to AI governance, model risk, and regulatory frameworks (preferred)
• Experience with agentic AI or autonomous workflows (preferred)
• Background in developer platforms or internal product platforms (preferred)

✨ What You’ll Gain:

• Competitive compensation and performance‑based incentives
• Medical coverage for you and your family
• Comprehensive life insurance
• Exposure to high‑impact, bank‑wide AI transformation
• A supportive, inclusive workplace culture
• Opportunities for long‑term career growth and leadership impact

title: AI Software Engineer
description:
상세 내용은 여기(https://s2w.career.greetinghr.com/ko/o/199550)에서 확인 가능 합니다!

온/오프라인 커피챗 모두 가능하니 편하게 연락주세요!

- 주요 업무

고객의 “핵심 문제”를 정의하고 해결하는 End-to-End 프로젝트를 수행합니다.

고객 요구사항을 정량 지표로 정의하고, 목표 달성을 위한 문제 해결 전략과 실행 계획을 수립합니다.

문제를 이해하고 데이터 구조화를 수행합니다. 이기종 DB/스키마/데이터 형태를 공통 문제 모델로 매핑하며 데이터 파이프라인 자동화/표준화를 수행합니다.

데이터 탐색 → 피처 생성 → 모델링/추론 → 성능 평가까지 유연하게 실험·개발하며, 문제 유형에 맞는 기법(최적화, 추론 등)을 조합합니다.

결과를 실제 업무에 적용하기 위해 고객 특화 UI(결과 조회, 근거 시각화, 케이스 관리/승인, 피드백 루프) 설계·개발에 참여합니다.

연구/PoC 결과를 운영 가능한 형태로 전환하여 운영 품질을 확보합니다.

프로젝트 종료 후 재사용 가능한 모듈/설정/매핑/룰/피처를 자산화하여, 다음 프로젝트의 공수 절감과 납품 효율을 지속적으로 개선합니다.
